motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:

```python
class Solution:
    def robotWithString(self, s: str) -> str:
        t = ""
        while s != "":
            if s[0] not in t:
                t += s.pop(0)
            else:
                s.pop(-1)
                t += s.pop(-1)
        return t
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
